retry_reason: put operation either frees the object or does nothing; retrying would be a double-put or no-op.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that decrements the reference count of a btrfs_io_context (bioc) and frees the object if the count reaches zero. The caller must not use the bioc pointer after calling this function, as it may have been freed. Passing a NULL pointer is safe and results in a no-op. This function is the standard release path for btrfs_io_context objects, typically called when a consumer is done with a reference acquired via a corresponding get operation.
